transition.label: env_scenario == SCENARIO_NORMAL
channel_report!
ChannelClass = CHANNELCLASS_NOMINAL, channel_degraded_flag = false, ch_enabled_count = 1, c_meas = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_COMM_DEGRADED
channel_report!
ChannelClass = CHANNELCLASS_INTERFERENCE_LIMITED, channel_degraded_flag = true, ch_enabled_count = 1, c_meas = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_SENSING_DEGRADED
channel_report!
ChannelClass = CHANNELCLASS_MOBILITY_LIMITED, channel_degraded_flag = true, ch_enabled_count = 1, c_meas = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_JOINT_DEGRADED
channel_report!
ChannelClass = CHANNELCLASS_OUTAGE, channel_degraded_flag = true, ch_enabled_count = 1, c_meas = 0
PilotDensityClass == PILOTDENSITYCLASS_OK && BLERClass == BLERCLASS_OK && DRTClass == DRTCLASS_OK
signal_report!
SignalClass = SIGNALCLASS_PILOT_BASED, c_sig = 0
BLERClass != BLERCLASS_OK || DRTClass == DRTCLASS_BAD || PayloadSenseClass == PAYLOADSENSECLASS_FAILED
signal_report!
SignalClass = SIGNALCLASS_LIMITED, signal_degraded_flag = true, c_sig = 0
c_rec == D_BM && BeamErrorClass != BEAMERRORCLASS_LOCKABLE && BlockageClass != BLOCKAGECLASS_CONFIRMED
beam_failure!
BeamClass = BEAMCLASS_FAILED
env_scenario == SCENARIO_NORMAL
sensing_report!
SensingState = SENSINGSTATE_SENSINGQOSOK, sensing_degraded_flag = false, sensing_qos_ok = true, sq_enabled_count = 1, c_sense = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_COMM_DEGRADED
sensing_report!
SensingState = SENSINGSTATE_SENSINGQOSOK, sensing_degraded_flag = false, sensing_qos_ok = true, sq_enabled_count = 1, c_sense = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_SENSING_DEGRADED
sensing_report!
SensingState = SENSINGSTATE_FRESHNESSLIMITED, sensing_degraded_flag = true, sensing_qos_ok = false, sq_enabled_count = 1, c_sense = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_JOINT_DEGRADED
sensing_report!
SensingState = SENSINGSTATE_SENSINGFAILURE, sensing_failure_flag = true, sensing_qos_ok = false, sq_enabled_count = 1, c_sense = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_NORMAL
phy_kpi_report!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYNORMAL, comm_ok = true, sensing_qos_ok = true, degradation_flag = false, c_report = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_COMM_DEGRADED
phy_kpi_report!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYCOMMUNICATIONDEGRADED, comm_ok = false, sensing_qos_ok = true, degradation_flag = true, c_report = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_SENSING_DEGRADED
phy_kpi_report!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYSENSINGDEGRADED, comm_ok = true, sensing_qos_ok = false, degradation_flag = true, c_report = 0
env_scenario == SCENARIO_JOINT_DEGRADED
phy_kpi_report!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYJOINTDEGRADED, comm_ok = false, sensing_qos_ok = false, degradation_flag = true, c_report = 0
ChannelClass == CHANNELCLASS_OUTAGE || BeamClass == BEAMCLASS_FAILED || SensingState == SENSINGSTATE_SENSINGFAILURE
phy_failure!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYFAILURE
target_detected!
PRSClass = PRSCLASS_OK, BeamErrorClass = BEAMERRORCLASS_LOCKABLE, BlockageClass = BLOCKAGECLASS_NONE
